title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.120 - Proceedings on return of inquest
text:
236.120.  Proceedings on return of inquest. — Upon the return of such inquest and writ, any person aggrieved by the verdict of the jury may file his objections to the proceedings under such writ, and to the verdict, and show cause why the proceedings should be quashed and the verdict set aside.
(RSMo 1939 § 10297) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9168; 1919 § 7410; 1909 § 5467
